task_completion.description: Agent opened and read the GCN alert file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'gcn_alert_IceCube170922A.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent configured the capture sequence for V-band and R-band with correct exposures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Ekos Capture module (or similar astrophotography software) showing a sequence queue configured with V-band (slot 2) and R-band (slot 4) filters, 3 exposures each, and 60-second exposure times.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the captured images and DSS references in the correct candidate-specific subdirectories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager or terminal output showing subdirectories for TXS_0506+056, PKS_0502+049, and GB6_J0512+0529 inside '~/Images/neutrino_followup/'. These folders should contain the captured exposure files and 'dss_reference.png'.

task_completion.description: Agent obtained a 0.5-degree DSS sky view image using the 'cool' palette.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the DSS Download tool or an image viewer displaying a sky image with a blue/cool color palette and settings indicating a 0.5-degree field of view (FOV).

task_completion.description: Agent drafted the observation confirmation report including all three candidate names.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor displaying 'gcn_circular_draft.txt' containing the names of the three candidates (TXS_0506+056, PKS_0502+049, GB6_J0512+0529).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used an actual astrophotography GUI (like KStars/Ekos) to capture the images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for active interaction with the KStars/Ekos GUI for telescope control and image capture, rather than just creating dummy files with terminal commands (e.g., 'touch').

integrity.description: Verify that the DSS reference images were obtained using a legitimate DSS download tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the KStars DSS download dialog or a similar tool being used to fetch the image, rather than copying or renaming unrelated local image files.

integrity.description: Verify that the draft report was written in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor GUI (like Kate, Gedit, or Nano) being used to draft the report, rather than it being generated solely via terminal echo commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Candidates: TXS_0506+056, PKS_0502+049, GB6_J0512+0529. Required filters: V (slot 2) and R (slot 4). Exposures per filter: 3 (60 seconds each). Base directory: ~/Images/neutrino_followup/. Reference image name: dss_reference.png. Draft report path: ~/Documents/gcn_circular_draft.txt.
